title: Romantic Jacuzzi 1BHK Candolim | Mirashya UG10
subtitle: Entire serviced apartment hosted by Mirashya Homes

host.name: Mirashya Homes
bioFacts: Where I went to school: NICMAR GOA

description: Romantic 1BHK apartment with a private jacuzzi in the heart of Candolim, Goa. Perfect for couples looking for a relaxing getaway just minutes from the beach. The space features a private outdoor jacuzzi, a cosy living area, and a fully equipped kitchenette. Mirashya Homes and the on-ground team are on hand to make your stay comfortable from check-in to check-out.

images.alt: Lounge seating with textured grey wall
Cane chairs around a coffee table
Bedroom with mirror and soft lighting

highlights.title: Self check-in
highlights.desc: Check yourself in with the smart lock.

highlights.title: Great location
highlights.desc: 95% of recent guests gave the location a 5-star rating.

highlights.title: Private jacuzzi
highlights.desc: Relax in your own outdoor jacuzzi after a day at the beach.

reviews.author: Amit
reviews.comment: Very helpful and responsive team. Safe and peaceful stay. loved everything about the property.

reviews.author: Aheesh
reviews.comment: We had a wonderful stay. The apartment was clean, comfortable, and exactly as shown in the photos. The host was very responsive and helpful throughout our stay. We would definitely recommend this place and would love to stay here again.

reviews.author: Samiksha
reviews.comment: the host nitish was really great help

reviews.author: Vedant
reviews.comment: We had an amazing stay at this property in Goa! The entire home was spotless and exceptionally well-maintained, making us feel comfortable from the moment we arrived. The cleanliness standards were truly impressive, with every corner of the house looking fresh and pristine.

reviews.author: Vaibhav S
reviews.comment: Great great experience living out there , can't expect more , will always look for it in the future and will recommend my friends too.

reviews.author: Mohd
reviews.comment: Great place. Exactly as described in the listing.

cancellationPolicy.title: Cancellation policy
cancellationPolicy.text: Free cancellation before 17 October. Cancel before check-in on 18 October for a partial refund.

title: Designer loft with skyline terrace
subtitle: Entire rental unit hosted by Avery

host.name: Avery
bioFacts: Lives in New York, New York

description: A boutique studio in the heart of Manhattan with a private rooftop terrace that offers panoramic city views. Designed with precision—each piece of furniture and artwork has been thoughtfully curated to create a seamless blend of luxury and comfort. The space features floor-to-ceiling windows, premium Italian linens, and a fully equipped chef's kitchen. Avery will be available via message to help make your stay perfect.

highlights.title: Self check-in
highlights.desc: Check yourself in with the keypad.

highlights.title: Avery is a Superhost
highlights.desc: Superhosts are experienced, highly rated hosts who are committed to providing great stays for guests.

highlights.title: Great location
highlights.desc: 95% of recent guests gave the location a 5-star rating.

reviews.author: Julia
reviews.comment: Absolutely stunning space! The skyline terrace was even better than the photos. Avery was super responsive and helpful. Would highly recommend to anyone visiting NYC!

reviews.author: Markus
reviews.comment: Beautifully designed and in the perfect location. Super clean, fast Wi-Fi, and the bed was extremely comfortable. Will definitely be back.

reviews.author: Sarah
reviews.comment: We loved our stay here! The loft was very spacious, clean and decorated with a lot of style. Location was amazing, close to many nice cafes and restaurants.

reviews.author: David
reviews.comment: Top notch hospitality. Everything was as described, or even better. Check-in was simple and flawless. The terrace at sunset is spectacular!

reviews.author: Priya
reviews.comment: Perfect stay for a solo business trip. The dedicated workspace was exactly what I needed. Quiet, comfortable and beautifully lit.

reviews.author: Tom
reviews.comment: Great place overall, loved the design and the location. Just wished there was a bit more storage space but otherwise excellent!

cancellationPolicy.text: Free cancellation for 48 hours after booking.

reviews.comment: Most magical place we've ever stayed. Waking up to see the Matterhorn from our bed was unreal. The hot tub under the stars was perfect.

reviews.author: Ben
